name: Syuna Table Lamp - 17 Inch Height - TBL4531 - Black/Gold - Safavieh
description: Introducing the Syuna 17-inch Iron Table Lamp, an elegant addition to any space with a touch of modern flair. Its striking black and gold color combination creates a sleek and contemporary look that complements a variety of interior styles. Crafted from durable iron, this lamp offers a sturdy presence on your table or desk. The unique design enhances any room, providing a warm and inviting ambiance. Whether you are updating your home office or adding a stylish element to your living room decor, the Syuna table lamp is a versatile choice. Its compact size makes it ideal for areas where space is at a premium while still delivering great lighting performance. Elevate your environment with the simple yet sophisticated presence of this beautifully crafted lamp.
